zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk於1517年1月17日出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset39歲，母親Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset31歲。他於1533年與Lady Frances Brandon在英國素瑞結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1554年2月23日在他的家鄉享年37歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk于1517年1月17日出生在英国倫敦时，他的父亲Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset39岁，母亲Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset31岁。他于1533年与Lady Frances Brandon在英国素瑞结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1554年2月23日在他的家乡享年37岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk was born on 17 January 1517, in London, England, his father, Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset, was 39 and his mother, Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset, was 31. He married Lady Frances Brandon in 1533, in Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died on 23 February 1554, in his hometown, at the age of 37, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk est né le 17 janvier 1517, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Lady Frances Brandon en 1533, à Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé le 23 février 1554, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England: Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk am 17. Januar 1517 in London, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset 39 und seine Mutter Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset 31. Er hat 1533 in Surrey, England Lady Frances Brandon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Februar 1554 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk è nato il il 17 gennaio 1517 nel London, England, il suo padre, Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Lady Frances Brandon nel 1533, nel Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 23 febbraio 1554, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolkが1517年1月17日にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorsetは39歳，母Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorsetは31歳であった。1533年にイギリススリーでLady Frances Brandonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1554年2月23日に故郷で37歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk(이)가 1517년 1월 17일 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1533년 영국 수리에서 Lady Frances Brandon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1554년 2월 23일 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Frances Brandon em 1533, em Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Grey 1st Duke of Suffolk родился 17 января 1517 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Grey Marquess of Dorset было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Wotton Marchioness of Dorset, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Frances Brandon в 1533 г. в местности сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер 23 февраля 1554 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.
